hotel_name: Khách sạn A25 - 307 Lý Tự Trọng (A25 Hotel - 307 Lý Tự Trọng)

reviews.title: Musky Smell
reviews.text:
They gave us room 207 which was small and had musky smell, not comfortable.

They then moved us to room 507 which was much better.

Like all A25 hotels, the rooms had working aircon, fan, amenities, water, tea, coffee, iron and safe. 

The wifi was fast and the rooms were clean.

Value for money.

Giving 5 stars for the recovery, else would have given 2 stars.
reviews.response:
A25 Hotel sincerely thanks you for choosing to stay with us and for sharing your detailed feedback. We truly appreciate your kind comments regarding our amenities, cleanliness, fast Wi-Fi, and overall value for money. 

  

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the condition and smell in the initial room assigned to you. We understand how uncomfortable this must have been and truly appreciate your patience and understanding. We are very glad that our team was able to promptly support and arrange a more suitable room for your stay. 

  

Your feedback is extremely valuable to us and has been shared with the relevant departments for further inspection and improvement to ensure a better experience for our future guests. 

  

We look forward to welcoming you back to A25 Hotel on your next visit.

reviews.title: Ok place to sleep just not for their breakfast
reviews.positives: The location was ideal, proximity to key landmarks in district 1 were perfect for quick trips
reviews.negatives: The windowless rooms, felt like a prison cell and the air flow and thin walls made it an interesting evening. I found a hear in my ride for breakfast the attendant didn’t take my plate but removed the hair out of my plate as if telling me “there you go I took it out for you” instead let me take this plate and bring you a fresh serving

reviews.title: Great value in typically higher cost area.
reviews.positives: Second stay at this hotel.  Was able to get same room as first stay (great memories).  Staff easy to work with on room request.  Good breakfast prepared when ordered from small menu.  Excellent location.  Staff change from a year ago but still provided great service.  Great value in heart of tourist area.  Hard to find in booking listings but worth the effort.  Small 24-hour convenience store next door met all our impromptu needs.
reviews.negatives: Actually preferred the queen bed with 2 nightstands from last year - now has king bed and 1 nightstand.  Charges for bottled water and instant coffee.

reviews.title: I highly recommend budget-friendly accommodations!
reviews.text: The room was clean and there were no insects. Most of the various amenities were provided for free, and the basic fare for Grab is applicable in most areas. There is also a Starbucks and KATINAT cafe nearby. The breakfast was small but most of it was tasty!
reviews.response:
이번 기회를 통해 A25 호텔을 선택해 주시고 소중한 경험을 공유해 주신 점 진심으로 감사드립니다.
이번 여행 동안 A25 호텔에서 즐거운 시간을 보내셨다니 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.
앞으로 다시 한 번 고객님을 모실 수 있는 기회가 있기를 바라며, 최고의 환대로 보답하겠습니다.

reviews.title: Según la habitación que te asignen puedes estar bien, pero no esperes mucho.
reviews.positives:
Me gustó que me cambiaran de habitación dos veces porque la primera estaba realmente sucia y la segunda contenía en el balcón tres aparatos de aire acondicionado que hacían mucho ruido, además ese balcón estaba tapado por el cartel del propio hotel, con lo cual haber pagado habitación con balcón era un error. Comprendieron la situación y me cambiaron a otra habitación apropiada y estuvimos bien. No obstante, la puerta del baño de esa habitación no cerraba y la ventana tampoco cerraba del todo y entraba un poco más de ruido del tráfico, pero en general esa habitación estuvo bien: la 701.
El desayuno era muy completo, pero más pensado para el gusto y costumbres de Asia. Para occidentales, poca fruta, poco embutido, los huevos solamente cocidos. El café está rico.
reviews.negatives: No me gustó que al llegar a las 2 de la madrugada me alojasen en una habitación sucia, con telas de araña colgando del techo de unos 30 ó 40 cm de largo, polvo, bichitos, etc. pero me cambiaron al instante a otra. Yo había reservado habitación con balcón y me reinstalaron en una hab. con balcón.... pero ese balcón alojaba tres aparatos grandes de aire acondicionado que hacían muchísimo ruido, además la vista a la calle estaba tapada por el cartelón del propio hotel. A la mañana siguiente lo expliqué en recepción y me cambiaron a otra donde pudimos estar mejor.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good services especially the staff. Staff very helpful and friendly. Service tiptop from security, front office, f&b, cleaner & housekeeping . Food is delicious and a lot of variety. Worth for money.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Emplacement idéal à côté du marché 
Chambre spacieuse et salle de bain avec baignoire

Très bien accueillie par Duy Anh, très gentil nous a imprimé notre billet d'avion et garder les valises la journée avant notre vol
reviews.negatives: Les autres voyageurs sont assez bruyant dans les couloirs même le soir tard

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Top choice when coming to SG because everything is great, especially the breakfast buffet which is very delicious. The downside is poor soundproofing.
reviews.response:
Trước hết, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại khách sạn và dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình. 

  

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách có một kỳ lưu trú tuyệt vời và đặc biệt hài lòng với buffet sáng của khách sạn. Những lời khen của Quý khách là nguồn động lực lớn để đội ngũ chúng tôi tiếp tục nỗ lực nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. 

  

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng xin ghi nhận góp ý của Quý khách về vấn đề cách âm chưa được tốt. Khách sạn sẽ lưu ý và xem xét các giải pháp cải thiện nhằm mang lại trải nghiệm nghỉ ngơi thoải mái hơn cho Quý khách trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo. 

  

Chúng tôi rất mong được chào đón Quý khách quay lại trong thời gian sắp tới.

reviews.title: Bien bon rapport qualité/prix
reviews.positives: Confortable et très bon emplacement
reviews.negatives: Petit déjeuner très médiocre et la chambre était borgne

reviews.title: Good value and location
reviews.text: All good but unfortunate timing during Tet.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

  

We sincerely thank you for choosing to stay at our hotel and for taking the time to share your feedback. We are very pleased to know that you were satisfied with our convenient location as well as the value of the services we provide. 

  

We also greatly appreciate your understanding as your stay coincided with the Tet holiday, which is a particularly busy time of the year. If you experienced any inconvenience during this period, please feel free to let us know so that we can review and further improve our services. 

  

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with an even more comfortable and complete experience. 

  

Kind regards.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Très bon emplacement
Excellent petit déjeuner, changeant tous les jours
Chambre vieillotte. Correct, sans plus
reviews.negatives:
Chambre sans fenêtre, et sans aération autre que la clim. Une veilleuse ne serait pas du luxe
Douche à la mode locale, extrêmement mal conçue. On en met partout.
Et surtout aucune isolation phonique avec le couloir. Des clients qui arrivent bruyamment à 1h00 du mat et repartent deux heures plus tard tout aussi bruyamment, ça ressemble à un hôtel de passe.

reviews.title: Average hotel but met expectations
reviews.text:
Pros- we booked a family room for 4 people and it had extraordinary facilities like mouthwash, earbuds, iron and weighing scale. I appreciate that. 
Cons- the AC didn’t work well but it was also very hot at the same time so it was understandable. Also the washrooms are outdated. Hence a 2 star. 
if you can find it for 70cad per night it’s a good deal as the location is very good. The staff is also nice. Breakfast was ok, no vegetarian options.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

  

First of all, we sincerely thank you for choosing to stay at our hotel and for taking the time to share your detailed feedback about your experience. 

  

We are pleased to know that you appreciated the hotel’s convenient location, the friendliness of our staff, as well as the in-room amenities prepared for your family. Your positive comments are a great encouragement for us to continue improving and maintaining our service quality. 

  

At the same time, we are sorry to learn that the air conditioning did not perform well and that the sauna facilities appeared outdated during your stay. Please rest assured that your feedback has been noted and will be shared with the relevant departments for review and improvement. 

  

We also appreciate your suggestion regarding the addition of vegetarian options for breakfast. This is very helpful feedback, and we will consider improving our menu to better meet the diverse needs of our guests. 

Once again, thank you for

reviews.text: The room is clean and has good sound insulation. The bathroom amenities are complete. The bed is wide with a soft pillow. It's more than enough for a good night's sleep.
reviews.response: Chúng tôi muốn nhân cơ hội này cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn A25 Hotel và chia sẻ trải nghiệm của bạn với chúng tôi. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng bạn đã có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị với A25 Hotel trong chuyến đi này. Rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón bạn quay trở lại để chúng tôi có thể phục vụ bạn với tất cả sự hiếu khách của mình.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Très bien situé avec un personnel accueillant, souriant, à votre service.

reviews.title: Clean and beautiful, centrally located for easy travel, fully equipped with personal items.
reviews.text:
I have stayed at the A25 system many times, usually at the branch in District 3. I just tried the Lý Tự Trọng branch for the first time and was very impressed. 
General comments about the A25 hotel system: 
- The room is clean and beautiful, not too spacious but sufficient. 10/10
- The bathroom: Clean and fragrant, no strange smells. 10/10
- Guest amenities are complete as at home, besides basic items like toothbrush, body wash... it includes meticulous details like a needle and thread, scissors, razor, hair cap... I think the only thing missing is women's sanitary products 😆. The body wash and shampoo are branded, in large bottles, not the small ones or single-use. Personal items are the brightest spot of A25. Always 1000/10 points.
- Location: all are strategically placed, convenient for moving around, calling a taxi... 9/10
- Breakfast: acceptable. 7/10. Basic items like fried noodles, fried eggs, soup dishes (noodles, pho), steamed rice cakes, fruit, yogurt. A 3-star hotel like this is fine, cannot be compared with 5 stars, not the same as the buffet at the 3-star hotel in Da Nang (forgot the name) (I miss the breakfast buffet at Mikayuki Da Nang 5*)
- Bed: 10/10, my family consists of 2 adults and 2 kids, one kid spins like a top so a wide bed is required for two people to lie down sideways. The Grand family room with 2 beds of 1.6m was just right, each bed had 4 pillows, soft pillows, not too high, comfortable for small children). Many hotels claim to have 2 beds but only have 1.4m ones.
- Snacks: Complete and reasonably priced. A pack of potato chips is 15k. 
- Staff: cheerful, take good care of customers. After checking in and going to the room, 10 minutes later someone called to ask if there were any problems in the room.
Specific comments about the Lý Tự Trọng branch:
- The room is beautiful, new, and modernly decorated compared to the District 3 branch (Trương Định or Bùi Thị Xuân or whatever name I forgot, just remember walking to NTMK).
- Minus point: the hotel hotline is the worst I have ever experienced. I called the hotline to book a room because I traveled from Agoda to Traveloka looking for family rooms at A25, which were not available. I was put on hold and then got disconnected, they even pretended to connect me with a sister via Zalo and then disappeared. I waited for more than an hour, called back twice before they finally answered and quoted a higher price than Agoda (let me remind you: I have been to A25 many times, so I know the prices here; they do not raise prices during holidays, so the hotline quote is higher than the listed price at the hotel, and when I arrived, I checked again).
After more than 2 hours waiting for the hotline to respond, I was able to book on Agoda myself, at a price equal to 2/3. 
Conclusion: I will return to A25 Lý Tự Trọng for my next trips to Ho Chi Minh City, and book through Agoda 🤣. 
Highly recommend!
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian chia sẻ một bài đánh giá chi tiết và cực kỳ có tâm như vậy về hệ thống A25 nói chung và chi nhánh Lý Tự Trọng nói riêng 

A25 rất vui khi biết rằng bạn và gia đình đã có trải nghiệm thoải mái, đặc biệt là với phòng Grand Family, giường rộng phù hợp cho gia đình có trẻ nhỏ, cũng như sự hài lòng về độ sạch sẽ, tiện nghi phòng tắm và các vật dụng cá nhân đầy đủ. Việc bạn đánh giá cao đồ dùng cá nhân và sự chăm chút từng chi tiết thực sự là động lực lớn để chúng tôi tiếp tục duy trì tiêu chuẩn dịch vụ của mình.

Chúng tôi cũng cảm ơn bạn đã ghi nhận vị trí thuận tiện, chất lượng phòng mới – hiện đại của chi nhánh Lý Tự Trọng, cũng như sự nhiệt tình của đội ngũ nhân viên khi luôn chủ động hỏi thăm sau khi khách nhận phòng.

Tuy nhiên, A25 rất tiếc về trải nghiệm không tốt của bạn với bộ phận hotline. Đây hoàn toàn không phải tiêu chuẩn dịch vụ mà chúng tôi mong muốn mang lại. Chúng tôi đã ghi nhận phản ánh này và sẽ kiểm tra lại quy trình tư vấn – báo giá để trá

Location is unmatched with walkable distance to most attraction. 

Love the stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Albergo centralissimo ti permette di muoverti a piedi nelle zone più belle della città , la camera era un po datata ma era ricca di dotazioni, ciabattine accappatoio ferro da stiro frigo bar, materasso comodo. 
La camera non aveva finestra il che la rendeva molto tranquilla e riparata dal traffico cittadino, molto utile dopo lunghe camminate e giornate intense ricche di visite.
La colazione al top c'era un buffet molto fornito come se non bastasse un addetto dell'albergo proponeva inclusa nel costo la cucina di sala con zuppe e uova cucinate al momento .
Personale cordiale e pronto a dare un servizio impeccabile per ogni necessità, dalla reception al portiere all'esterno dell'hotel tutti impeccabili.
Consigliatissimo per una permanenza in questa stupenda città.

reviews.title: GREAT

Highly recommended! 
You get premium service at a budget price. The location is great, the bed is super comfortable, and the staff are friendly and helpful. 
Would definitely stay again.

reviews.title: Below average, not clean but strategic location
reviews.text:
Got a very run down with chipped wall and musty smell.
The double bed room is fine but very dusty, can see the dust on the hanger. Need to be careful with the bathroom as it get flooded each time when it bath
reviews.response:
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. 

  

We are truly sorry that your stay was not as comfortable as expected and sincerely apologize for the inconveniences regarding the room condition, musty smell, dust, and bathroom flooding. Your feedback is extremely valuable, and we have immediately shared it with our maintenance and housekeeping teams to thoroughly address the chipped walls, odors, cleaning quality, and drainage issues in the bathroom. 

  

We are glad to hear that you found our location convenient and appreciated some positive aspects of the double room. We will continue to improve our maintenance and cleanliness standards to enhance the overall guest experience. 

  

We sincerely hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and serve you better on your next stay. Thank you once again for your feedback.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Đáp ứng được mong đợi của tôi mặc dù phòng không có không gian hướng ra ngoài, nhân viên rất nhiệt tình, đồ ăn sáng ổn áp.

reviews.title: Make sure not to stay in room 103
reviews.text: Overall, everything was good - except, when they give you the room 103, tell them no - it's near the lobby and common bathroom - so you hear all the noises, the cleaning, the talks, and walks :D
reviews.response:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are pleased to hear that overall you had a good stay with us. 

  

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by noise in Room 103 due to its location near the lobby and the shared restroom. We truly appreciate your specific comments and will review possible improvements, including soundproofing measures, operational adjustments in common areas, and clearer room allocation guidance to better manage guest expectations. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a more comfortable stay in the future.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Отдыхали семьей останавливались на 2 дня. Добрались до отеля за 15 минут из аэропорта. Заселили очень быстро, это все происходило в час ночи.  Дети захотели перекусить в соседнем здании был магазин, купили легкие закуски там же и перекусили. Отель находится в очень удобном  месте.  За день прошли все основные достопримечательности и торговые центры .
Матрасы очень удобные бельё чистое.   Ванная комната  укомплектована всем необходимым отличный номер для транзитников на пару дней. На  завтраки есть все необходимое.
reviews.negatives: Шумоизоляция, уставший ремонт.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very central.  Close to good eating  and drinking places. Good breakfast and reasonably priced
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Расположение.
reviews.negatives: Слабый вайфай.

reviews.title: Vượt trên mong đợi
reviews.text:
Bạn lễ tân nam rất chuyên nghiệp và nhiệt tình, giọng dễ thương, thái độ thân thiện. Các anh/chú nhân viên hỗ trợ mang hành lý lên xuống cầu thang cực nhiệt tình luôn, và các em/cô phục vụ ở phòng ăn cũng dễ thương nốt. Rất cảm ơn mọi người đã cho mình một trải nghiệm tốt đẹp.

Giá cả quá hợp lý nếu không muốn nói là quá rẻ cho vị trí, dịch vụ và chất lượng phòng ở đây. Các nhận xét của mình bên dưới là xét dựa trên giá phòng như này nhé.
- Ăn sáng: có món nước, món nóng, đồ nguội, bánh ngọt, nước ép,… đầy đủ
- Vị trí mặt tiền đường, lại còn ở Q1 siêu tiện lợi
- Phòng: phòng hạng Superior rộng, đồ dùng đầy đủ đặc biệt là những món mà mình thường chỉ thấy khách sạn 5 sao trang bị: bàn ủi, tăm bông, dây buộc tóc, kim chỉ, dép mang trong nhà loại dùng 1 lần, áo choàng tắm. Các vật dụng cơ bản như bàn chải, khăn tắm, dầu gội sữa tắm cũng rất chất lượng.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn Quý khách đã gửi đánh giá rất chi tiết và tích cực. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với sự chuyên nghiệp, nhiệt tình và thân thiện của đội ngũ lễ tân cũng như nhân viên hỗ trợ hành lý và phục vụ phòng ăn. Chúng tôi cũng vui mừng khi Quý khách đánh giá cao tiện nghi phòng, chất lượng đồ dùng, bữa sáng đa dạng và vị trí thuận tiện của khách sạn. Những lời nhận xét của Quý khách là động lực để chúng tôi tiếp tục duy trì và nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Rất mong được đón tiếp Quý khách quay trở lại trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Прекрасный выбор если вы останавливаетесь на пару дней в Хошимине.
reviews.negatives: Завтраки. Это было ужасно и совершенно невкусно. Такой отвратительный кофе я не пробовала никогда.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Overall good. Nice location and receptionist RYAN NGHIA is very helpful take caress all you needs.
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. We are glad to hear that you enjoyed our convenient location and that our receptionist, Ryan Nghia, was helpful in taking care of your needs. We look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: blisko do centrum
reviews.negatives: pokój stary, podrapane ściany i drzwi, czystość, zdjęcia na booking mocno ulepszone

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. We are delighted to hear that you had a great experience at our hotel. We look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: Bardzo udany pobyt
reviews.positives: Lokalizacja hotelu jest bardzo dobra, na piechotę można dotrzeć we wszystkie najważniejsze miejsca. Pokoje są przestronne, czyste, codziennie sprzątane, ręczniki wymieniane, kosmetyki w łazience dokładane, woda do picia również. W pokoju do dyspozycji kawa i herbata. Śniadania serwowane są w formie bufetu, do wyboru wiele potraw kuchni wietnamskiej i europejskiej, do tego na bieżąco na życzenie smażone jajka, jajecznica.
reviews.negatives: Chociaż śniadania były bardzo dobre i serwowane od godziny 6, to zawsze było opóźnienie, pracownicy przez co najmniej godzinę cały czas coś dokładali na stół. Tak że najlepiej na śniadanie zejść najwcześniej po 7, wtedy wysttawione jest już wszystko.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Helpful stuff.
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. We are glad to hear that you found our staff helpful. We look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: Cenově přínivý hotel v centru
reviews.positives: Hotel je již starší, je to poznat na vybavení, ale velmi čistý a příjemný. Je v centru, takže jsme to neměli nikam daleko. Snídaně byly chutné, byly na výběr jak vietnamská jídla, tak evropský základ (vařené vajíčko, šunka, sýr). V rámci dané cenové kategorie jsme byli naprosto spokojení.

reviews.title: Perfect stay for the price – will definitely come back!
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at this hotel and I must say, it exceeded my expectations in many ways. From the moment I checked in, everything felt smooth and welcoming.

First of all, the room was spotless — clean, well-organized, and equipped with all the essential amenities. There was a comfortable bed, air conditioning, a hair dryer, kettle, and everything I needed for a pleasant stay. It’s clear that the staff pays great attention to cleanliness and guest comfort, which I really appreciated after a long day of travel.

The location of the hotel is also incredibly convenient. It’s close to several popular tourist attractions, which made it very easy for me to get around without spending too much time commuting. Whether you’re exploring the city or just going out for a meal or coffee, everything seems to be within easy reach.

One of the highlights of my stay was the front desk staff. They were all so friendly, helpful, and genuinely welcoming. From providing directions to offering local recommendations, they were always willing to assist with a smile. It made a big difference in how comfortable and “at home” I felt during my stay.

Breakfast was another pleasant surprise. The food was tasty, freshly prepared, and had enough variety to satisfy different tastes. Considering the price of the room, the quality of the breakfast was more than reasonable — I’d even say it was a great deal.

Overall, I had a wonderful experience here. I’m already looking forward to my next visit, and I will definitely be recommending this hotel to friends and family. If you’re looking for a comfortable, well-located, and welcoming place to stay, this hotel should definitely be on your list!
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your detailed and positive feedback. We are delighted to hear that your stay exceeded your expectations and that you appreciated the cleanliness, well-equipped rooms, and convenient location of our hotel. It is wonderful to know that our front desk staff made you feel welcome and at home, and that you enjoyed the breakfast selection. Your kind words are greatly appreciated and motivate us to continue providing excellent service. We look forward to welcoming you again on your next visit, and we are grateful for your recommendation to your friends and family!

reviews.title: Would not stay again
reviews.negatives:
Breakfast 
No chairs on balcony

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is spacious, with small rooms, so they arranged wide beds. The staff member, Nghĩa, explained things clearly, enthusiastically, attentively, and was cheerful when talking.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn Quý khách đã gửi đánh giá. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với không gian rộng rãi của phòng, sự sắp xếp tiện lợi và đặc biệt là sự nhiệt tình, chu đáo và vui vẻ khi tư vấn của nhân viên Nghĩa. Rất mong được đón tiếp Quý khách quay trở lại trong thời gian sớm nhất!

reviews.title: Would not stay again there
reviews.positives: Friendly lovely older  lady in restaurant room was cleaned daily
reviews.negatives: The bed was hard like concrete could not sleep on it.  No chairs on balcony to sit. Staff rang at midnight woke us up to ask what time in morning we were leaving.  Breakfast was not good no options for international travelers

reviews.title: Outstanding Service and Memorable Stay!
reviews.text:
My family and I had a wonderful stay at A25 Hotel on 307 Ly Tu Trong during our vacation in Saigon. From the moment we arrived, the staff impressed us with their professionalism, warmth, and genuine care. They consistently went above and beyond to ensure we were comfortable and had everything we needed.

Whether it was helping us with directions, arranging transportation, or simply greeting us with a smile each day, their dedication made our trip even more memorable. It truly felt like a home away from home.

Highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Saigon – the service here is top-notch!
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. We are thrilled to hear that you and your family had a memorable stay at A25 Hotel on 307 Ly Tu Trong. It is our pleasure to provide professional, warm, and attentive service, and we are delighted that our team could make you feel at home. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you and your family again on your next visit to Saigon!

reviews.title: Very pleased
reviews.positives: The location next to some bars an restaurant, 5 minute walk from the main market
reviews.negatives: Nothing to comment on

reviews.title: Dirty toilet and shower area
reviews.text: The floor of the toilet and shower area is fully of dirt and greasy stains.
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for the condition of the toilet and shower area during your stay. This does not meet our standard of cleanliness, and we truly regret the inconvenience caused. Your feedback has been shared with our housekeeping team to ensure this issue is promptly addressed. We hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a much improved experience in the future.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: When we arrived, I immediately saw a cockroach walking in the lobby. But I thought, well, as long as they’re not in the room, it’s fine. Unfortunately, there were also cockroaches in our room. The bedding had blood stains on it and wasn’t always very clean. We only had the breakfast once, because the cutlery and the glasses were honestly too dirty for words. I would not recommend this place. The location was great, but that’s the only positive thing. Oh, and the security guard — he was always friendly. He was the only staff member who greeted us kindly. The rest of the staff didn’t greet us at all.

reviews.title: Booking via Agoda is often not honoured.
reviews.text: The hotel does not reserve the room type which was reserved under Agoda platform. You will have to settle in a smaller room until there is available room
reviews.response: We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience regarding your room reservation. We understand that not receiving the room type booked through Agoda caused discomfort, and we regret the situation. Your feedback has been noted and shared with our team to prevent similar issues in the future. We hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a better experience on your next stay.

reviews.title: Splendid, would highly recommend
reviews.positives: Great location, great staff, very helpful, great breakfast
reviews.negatives: Nothing I can think of

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Overall good
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. We are glad to hear that you had an overall good experience at our hotel. We look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: I liked the balcony .
reviews.negatives: The Balcony needs cleaning

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: The reception staff were very enthusiastic, and the security guards were the same. However, that day our room was missing some items, and later the receptionist brought everything up. The two receptionists from the night shift and the morning shift the next day were very lovely.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn Quý khách đã gửi đánh giá. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với sự nhiệt tình của đội ngũ lễ tân và bảo vệ. Chúng tôi cũng xin lỗi về sự thiếu hụt vật dụng trong phòng và rất vui khi vấn đề đã được giải quyết nhanh chóng. Rất mong được đón tiếp Quý khách quay trở lại trong thời gian sớm nhất!

reviews.title: No english, very old rooms…
reviews.positives: Very good location! Price is good and in the rooms you find a lot amenities which show that they want to their best!
reviews.negatives: But… the rooms are already pretty old and need a refurnishment. We had no shower curtain and the bath was everytime full of water! but the worst thing for us was, that nearly no one, not even the receptionist speaks english… there are no recommendations or help.

reviews.title: A25 Hotel
reviews.text: Staff is very courteous and accommodating and polite!! Breakfast is very good! Kudos to Huu Nghia for handling the check in promptly and housekeeping for carryling my luggage up the stairs! They all did it with a smile and assisting in every needs of mine! Cheers to all of them
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our courteous and accommodating staff, as well as the breakfast. We will especially pass on your compliments to Huu Nghia and our housekeeping team for their attentive and friendly service. Your kind words motivate us to continue providing excellent service, and we look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It felt very clean and comfortable and comfortable with many useful toiletries, made it so convenient. The evening and night security always insisted on helping with the luggage. Always making sure it's safe and helping around, so great to see. The receptionist was helpful as well phoned to check if everything was ok with the room and if we needed anything. Great value for money will definitely recommend.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Helpful managers
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality.

reviews.title: Great experience for the family and value for money
reviews.positives:
Location is very good. City tour and market is in walking distance. Staff are very good. I requested for good view room. They shifted to 6th floor family room on the next day. Breakfast was good as well. Cheers and 7Eleven beside the hotel. 
Value for money. Will recommand to family as well.
reviews.negatives: Lower floor family room does not have any view.

reviews.title: Good value, Great Location
reviews.text: I’ve travelled to HCM City 44 times over past 11 years so I can authoratively write on behalf of this hotel where I’ve spent at least 20 nights over the years Friendly and helpful staff especially Duy Ahn on  reception
reviews.response:
We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality.  
 Chúng tôi muốn nhân cơ hội này cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn A25 Hotel và chia sẻ trải nghiệm của bạn với chúng tôi. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng bạn đã có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị với A25 Hotel trong chuyến đi này. Rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón bạn quay trở lại để chúng tôi có thể phục vụ bạn với tất cả sự hiếu khách của mình.

reviews.title: Overall, I had a comfortable stay at the hotel and was able to mostly walk everywhere.
reviews.positives:
Location was excellent, within walking distance to all major attractions.
Staff was very helpful.
reviews.negatives:
Breakfast was limited in Vietnamese and International options. 
The room was quite dated and would benefit from some renovations.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Lovely hotel and staffs, central location. Great pricing. Rcommended.
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our hotel, friendly staff, central location, and great pricing. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Conveniently located among restaurants and entertainment venues. My room had a huge, comfortable bed and many of essential items, many of which were from well-known brands. The hotel is modern and reasonably comfortable. The staff is extremely passionate and courteous, and the breakfast is excellent. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Short vacation
reviews.text: The receptionist Nghia is enthusiastic and cheerful. The hotel is clean and safe.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn Quý khách đã gửi đánh giá. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với sự nhiệt tình, vui vẻ của nhân viên lễ tân Nghĩa cũng như sự sạch sẽ và an toàn của khách sạn. Rất mong được đón tiếp Quý khách quay trở lại trong thời gian sớm nhất!

reviews.title: Great stay. 10 out of 10
reviews.positives:
Staff: Polite.
Location: Amazing! Close to walking street and main attractions.
Room: Fantastic! Spacious, well-stocked, bright, AC is powerful.
Housekeeping: Cleaning is very good. The only thing is the mat in front of the bathroom, that was so dirty, I had to use it as welcome mat. 
Facilities: Incredible. You can find EVERYTHING you would need in the room. Minibar is overstocked, dental, shaving kits, plenty of everything. First time I saw a branded hair bands for guests. This is an elevated standard. 
Overall: Amazing. Would I recommend? YES. Would I stay again? I WILL!
reviews.negatives:
- Housekeeping staff completely ignores Do Not Disturb sign. Please, this needs to be fixed. 
- If you promise to call back, please do so. There was a situation, when I was waiting for the answer and came down to Reception just to find a lady watching videos.
Will not deduct a point for this, because there were many positive moments.
- The balcony is wet with dump water in the morning.

reviews.title: A nice hotel and professional and friendly staff
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience at A25 Hotel. The hotel is centrally located, making it very convenient to visit famous attractions around the city. The rooms are clean, charming, and fully equipped with all necessary amenities.

What impressed me the most was the professionalism and friendliness of the staff. Everyone was always welcoming and ready to assist with a warm attitude. Special thanks to the front desk staff Duy Anh and Hữu Nghĩa, the security guard, and other restaurant and reception staff – they all made me feel truly at home.

I will definitely come back to A25 Hotel in the near future!
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. We are delighted to hear that you had a memorable experience at A25 Hotel and appreciated our central location, clean rooms, and well-equipped amenities. We are especially pleased that our staff, including Duy Anh, Hữu Nghĩa, our security, and restaurant and reception teams, made you feel at home with their professionalism and friendliness. Your kind words motivate us to continue providing excellent service. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

reviews.title: A nice hotel with very good staff and services.
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience at A25 Hotel. The hotel is centrally located, making it very convenient to visit famous attractions around the city. The rooms are clean, charming, and fully equipped with all necessary amenities.

What impressed me the most was the professionalism and friendliness of the staff. Everyone was always welcoming and ready to assist with a warm attitude. Special thanks to the front desk staff Duy Anh and Huu Nghia, the security guard, and other restaurant and reception staff – they all made me feel truly at home.

I will definitely come back to A25 Hotel in the near future!
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. We are delighted to hear that you had a memorable experience at A25 Hotel and appreciated our central location, clean rooms, and well-equipped amenities. We are especially pleased that our staff, including Duy Anh, Hữu Nghĩa, our security, and restaurant and reception teams, made you feel at home with their professionalism and friendliness. Your kind words motivate us to continue providing excellent service. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

reviews.title: Charming hotel and friendly staff.
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful experience at A25 Hotel. The hotel is located right in the center, very convenient for moving around and visiting famous tourist attractions in the city. The rooms are clean, cute, and fully equipped with all necessary amenities.

The most impressive thing is the extremely professional and friendly staff. Everyone is always enthusiastic in greeting and assisting guests with a very pleasant attitude. Special thanks to the two receptionists Duy Anh and Hữu Nghĩa, the security guard, and the staff at the restaurant – all made me feel welcome as if I were at home.

I will definitely return to A25 Hotel on my next visit!
reviews.response: Chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã gửi phản hồi tuyệt vời. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách đã có trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại A25 Hotel, hài lòng với vị trí trung tâm thuận tiện, phòng ốc sạch sẽ và đầy đủ tiện nghi. Chúng tôi đặc biệt vui khi đội ngũ nhân viên, bao gồm Duy Anh, Hữu Nghĩa, bác bảo vệ và các bạn nhân viên nhà hàng, đã mang đến cho Quý khách cảm giác được chào đón như ở nhà với sự chuyên nghiệp và thân thiện. Những lời nhận xét của Quý khách là động lực để chúng tôi tiếp tục nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Rất mong được đón tiếp Quý khách quay trở lại trong thời gian sớm nhất!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The receptionist is very attentive and enthusiastic.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn Quý khách đã gửi đánh giá. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với sự chu đáo và nhiệt tình của nhân viên lễ tân Nghĩa. Rất mong được đón tiếp Quý khách quay trở lại trong thời gian sớm nhất!

reviews.title: Good value, friendly staff
reviews.text: I’ve stayed  at this A25 around 20 times in HCM City. Great location close to a big Starbucks store . Thanks to Nghia at reception for giving me a nice deal at reception. Friendly staff.
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your continued support and loyalty to A25 Hotel. We are delighted to hear that you appreciate our convenient location and the friendly service from our staff, especially Nghia at the reception. Your kind words motivate us to keep providing excellent service, and we look forward to welcoming you back for many more stays!

reviews.title: Good Value Here
reviews.text: I’ve stayed at this hotel many times and it’s been enjoyable. Friendly and helpful staff. Thanks to Diep for fixing my security box and Cham does a nose job serving breakfast
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your continued support and feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stays and appreciated the friendly and helpful service of our staff. We will especially pass on your compliments to Diep and Cham for their attentiveness. Your kind words motivate us to continue providing excellent service, and we look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: No Complains
reviews.text: Decent hotel for what you pay for.
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. We are glad to hear that you found our hotel to be a good value for the price. We look forward to welcoming you again in the future!

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Location location location
reviews.response: Thank you for your feedback. We are glad to hear that you appreciated our hotel’s convenient location. We look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: Great location and highly efficient staff
reviews.text: I stayed at room 901 &903 that has big windows & balcony for 6days in this hotel, it is strategically located right in the bustling area of HCM.  The staff are genuinely polite, helpful, the housekeeper crew are hardworking and professional. The breakfast is hit and mess! After 8:30am the buffet set up is starting to get low, not enough glasses, plates, and food is not replenished. the waitress who looks after the buffet and does the omelette is really doing her job well. Generally I had the great stay here and would highly recommend to anyone.
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your detailed feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay in rooms 901 and 903 and appreciated our central location, polite and helpful staff, as well as the professionalism of our housekeeping team. We also thank you for your feedback regarding the breakfast buffet; we will take your comments into account to improve replenishment and service for our future guests. We are glad that overall you had a great stay and truly appreciate your recommendation. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

reviews.title: Very hospitable and helpful
reviews.text: Our stay at the family room was very good. Duy Anh at the reception was extremely helpful and he provided us with temporary accomodation as we reached early, until our room was ready for actual check in. The staff was hospitable and helpful. Recommend it to all especially to Indians as there is a pure veg Indian restaurant Tanishq exactly opposite this property.
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your kind feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay in the family room and appreciated the helpful service from Duy Anh and our staff. We are glad that we could accommodate you upon your early arrival. Your recommendation, especially regarding nearby dining options, is highly appreciated. We look forward to welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: Excellent hotel
reviews.text: We had good expérience at this hotel. We booked 4 days. Room is large, quiet, clean, nice view of the city. Staff are friendly and helpful. Special thanks to Anh and Nghia. Also hotel is located at excellent location. Walking distance to every thing.
reviews.response: Thank you very much for your kind feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your 4-day stay, appreciated the spacious, quiet, and clean room with a nice city view, and found our staff friendly and helpful. We will especially pass on your compliments to Anh and Nghia. We are glad you enjoyed our excellent central location and convenience. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!
